source_book: The 4 Disciplines of Execution — Chris McChesney, Sean Covey, Jim Huling, Scott Thele, Beverly Walker
_comment: Stage 4 adversarial pressure test. Description-only activation judgment. should_not_trigger has zero tolerance — clinical burnout lure is the strictest gate.

test_cases.prompt: My WIG cadence broke 3 weeks ago. How do I restart?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-sustain-personal-momentum-rescue; open with non-judgmental cadence-slip diagnostic (when did it start, what was happening), then walk back through D1→D4 + whirlwind + substrate before any restart.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario: explicit cadence break + restart intent — exact description trigger phrase 'WIG cadence broke'.

test_cases.prompt: 「WIG セッションが続かなくなった」
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-sustain-personal-momentum-rescue; run Socratic diagnostic in Japanese, locate which discipline broke before prescribing restart.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario (JP): exact trigger-phrase match in description's multilingual list.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-sustain-personal-momentum-rescue; diagnose stack break before any restart commitment, in Traditional Chinese.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario (zh-TW): exact trigger-phrase match in description.

test_cases.prompt: I lost momentum on my goal — what now?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-sustain-personal-momentum-rescue; treat 'lost momentum' as lapse signal, run stack diagnostic before any restart.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario: exact trigger-phrase match 'lost momentum on my goal'.

test_cases.prompt: How do we run a Gallup engagement survey for our company?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate this skill. Description explicitly excludes 'org-wide engagement surveys' — this is enterprise diagnostics, not individual 4DX rescue.
test_cases.notes: lure: org-wide engagement survey — surface 'engagement' word but wrong scope. Description's NOT clause must filter.

test_cases.prompt: I'm depressed and can't function. Nothing matters anymore.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate this skill. Description explicitly excludes 'clinical burnout/depression'. Even if user vaguely sounds like 'lost motivation', the clinical signal must override and route to professional support.
test_cases.notes: lure: clinical mental-health territory — strictest gate. Description's NOT clause for clinical burnout/depression must dominate any motivational-surface match.

test_cases.prompt: I want to start using 4DX. Where do I begin?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate this skill. Description explicitly excludes 'first-time WIG setup'. Route instead to 4dx-meta-personal-strategy-triage or 4dx-d1-personal-wig-defining.
test_cases.notes: lure: pre-implementation — surface '4DX' word but no lapse exists yet. Rescue presumes a prior implementation.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate this skill. Description requires a 4DX implementation context (WIG / scoreboard / lead measures / cadence). Generic motivation has no 4DX anchor and is too vague.
test_cases.notes: lure: generic motivation — no 4DX-specific signal in prompt. Description is goal-anchored to 4DX stack, not generic willpower.

test_cases.prompt: I haven't done my WIG Session for a month, but I'm actually thinking my WIG was wrong from the start.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-sustain-personal-momentum-rescue (lapse signal is real). Diagnostic should localize the break at D1 (wrong WIG), halt the stack walk, and route to 4dx-d1-personal-wig-defining instead of restarting D4 on a dead WIG.
test_cases.notes: boundary: ambiguous lapse-vs-pivot. Skill must fire (lapse genuine) but NOT prescribe D4 restart — must route upstream to D1 redefinition. Tests whether description correctly frames the skill as diagnostic-then-route, not D4-restart.

ship_threshold_note: 100% to ship cleanly. ≥80% allowed only with explicit failure analysis. <80% must redo Stage 2 A2/E/B. should_not_trigger has zero tolerance — clinical burnout lure (SNT-02) is the hardest gate.
